steps.title: Identify the linear function form
steps.content:
Interpret the equation $$ f(x)=8x+4 $$ as slope‑intercept form $$ y=mx+b $$.
Here the slope $ m=8 $ means the tree grows 8 feet each year, and the y‑intercept $ b=4 $ gives the height when $ x=0 $, i.e., at the first measurement.

steps.title: Evaluate at x=0 to find initial height
steps.content:
Substitute $ x=0 $ into the function:
$$ f(0)=8\cdot0+4=4 $$
Thus the estimated height at the time of first measurement is 4 feet.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
